AboutPage.heading: About This Project
AboutPage.text: This application is a Star Trek Comic Strip Archive Explorer built using React, TypeScript, and React Router. It fetches data dynamically from the STAPI REST endpoint and features clean URL state management for searching, pagination, and side-by-side details tracking.
